### What changed

- [ ] Added a new chain file
- [ ] Updated an existing chain file
- [ ] Removed sample/test data
- [ ] Other

### Data checks

- [ ] File is in `data/nutrition/`
- [ ] Filename uses lowercase slug format, like `chick_fil_a.csv`
- [ ] CSV includes the required minimum columns
- [ ] Real rows have `is_sample_data=FALSE` if that column exists
- [ ] Macro columns are numeric where data is available
- [ ] Source is official or noted clearly
